target: 8.Shide
Good grief... That's unfair, Shinpei-kun... Looping like that...
Ya can't possibly know so much in just one day...
But well, calm down. How about sitting down for a cup of barley tea? It's okay, there's no poison in it.
You're admitting it!?
Heh... It seems Dr. Hishigata has spilled everything...
...Haa.
At that time, you see... I was 40 years old, so...
It was the summer of 1732. The year of what they call the 'Great Kyoho Famine'.
It's in the Japanese history textbooks.
It was a terrible crop failure... A lot of people died from starvation.
The adults who went out fishing died, and we couldn't even catch fish anymore. It was a living hell, I tell you.
...But then, Haine showed up.
To begin with, on this island, we believed that gods dwelled in things that washed ashore from the sea...
Haine was truly a god itself.
And, she ate people. In exchange, she brought bountiful catches...
Ah~~~~. That legend... that part is incorrect.
I just turned a few hundred islanders into shadows. If you're a shadow, even if you're not a fisherman, even without a boat or nets, you can catch fish...
You can save starving people...
The reason Hitogashima exists today is thanks to me.
Don't screw with me, you bastard!! Do you think you're doing the right thing!!?
Then, why...! Why'd ya kill Shinpei's parents!!!
Well, just like Ushio-chan, because they were in the way, of course.
They discovered Hiruko Cave... and tried to make it public. Good grief, if they just hadn't done anything unnecessary, they could have lived a little longer...
They were a foolish couple, but Mother ate them deliciously...
Ah.
Maybe you would have been happier if I had turned them into shadows?
I... I'm different from you...!!
I don't want to kill anyone... You don't want to die either, do you!!
Why? Why go so far to protect Haine!?
You're human... You shouldn't be able to go together to the hometown Haine is returning to...

Even if Haine dies,
you won't die either!
Hand over Haine... Can't we... end it with that...?
That is not my ending. Fulfilling my mother's wish is my mission.
(Damn it! Damn it...!!)
Besides, you never know. My shadow might be around.
(…Something's wrong…)
Pull the trigger!! There's no shadow presence nearby!!
(Why? Why is this guy--)
Shoot, Shinpei!!! Now is the only time to defeat Shide!!
I understand. You're thinking this right now...
Why ain't his left hand burned?'
...Right.
By the way, Shinpei-kun. Is it okay if I move now?
This is it! I can't hold back anymore!!
Ushio, wait--
He's dead... ...Is it over with this?
I said... I would do it, didn't I...
I never intended... to make you do something like this...
I can't let ya murder someone.
Why!!! This guy is my!! Enemy...!!!!
Shinpei is kind, so I'm sure you would have regretted it.
You see us as human, right? Both me, and a guy like this...
Leave all the dirty work from now on to me!!
Hah... Hah...! Kuh... Hah...!!
Shinpei!
U-Ushio... I...
(I... shot a person...!)
(But... why doesn't this guy have...)
(...a burn on his left hand...!?)
Calm down. Take a slow deep breath...
Y-Yeah...
*Inhale*...
*Exhale*...
Have you calmed down?
Yeah... sorry... I showed you a pathetic side of me...
...I should have done it after all.
Wh-Why...?
Because Shinpei is kind... You're regretting it a lot right now, aren't you...?
That's…
That's because you see us as humans. Both me, and a guy like this...
So…
Leave all the dirty work from now on to me!!
Ushio…
Let me borrow that! The phone is still connected, right?
Hello, was everyone listening?
We killed Shide--
...Shin--
Yes, one down.
Sorry... Shinpei... Notice... it...
That's too bad... Shinpei-kun...
Just a tiny bit. You didn't look at the big picture enough--
Don't you think?
Now.
How does it feel, Shinpei-kun?
Like an elementary schooler whose save data got erased right before the final boss...?
Ushio is dead.
Did you brats really think you could change my ending?
It's okay, Shinpei…
No matter what…
I'm with you...
The only things looping with you are despair and regret...
Take care now.
Acquired Key TIP: [<color=#GF_KEY_LOOPEND_07>7th END</color>].
